curation.synopsis: Lyse of Clan Urretzi is a sworn guardian of the Spike — a colossal vertical warren stitched together from failing machinery, hoarded scraps and the bones of older ages, sustained against the Outside by ritual and rationing. When she finds a strange medallion on a brutalised corpse, the rival clan she is supposed to marry into accuses her of theft, and the alliance that had been her only future becomes the proof of her guilt. Lyse goes to ground in the Spike's lower levels, hunting the truth of the medallion through galleries her people no longer remember they built. What she finds about her home is worse than exile.

flags.reason: Released as a Warhammer Horror Week 2020 eShort, not a novel
Self-contained Spike-clan setting; no Browse-Root 40K faction reliably surfaces in source coverage
